headline: WTW to Announce First Quarter Earnings on April 30, 2026
summary: LONDON, April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company, will announce its financial results for the first quarter on Thursday, April 30, 2026, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call to discuss its financial results at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, April 30, 2026. A live, listen-only webcast of the conference call will be available on WTW’s website. Analysts and institutional investors may participate

headline: Can Marsh Navigate Through Rising Costs in Q1 Earnings?
summary: MRSH is set to report Q1 2026 earnings on April 16, with EPS expected to rise 4.9% and revenues 4.6%. But rising operating costs could cloud results.

headline: Big M&A deals roar back to the forefront
summary: A surge of deals valued at $10 billion-plus closed in this year’s first quarter, although smaller deals may be in vogue for the rest of the year.
